headline: Eaton (ETN) Stock Looks Above Fair Value On Cash Flow Alone
summary: Eaton stock has delivered a strong 193.4% return over the past 5 years, and that rally now sits against a split valuation picture where the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate points to a premium while market multiples screen more supportive. Over 5 years, Eaton has returned 193.4%, which puts extra focus on whether the current price still lines up with underlying cash flow and earnings power. The key support for today's valuation is investor enthusiasm for Eaton's role in electrification...
